# ColorSwatch

A color swatch component for displaying color samples. Also includes a mix variant for showing multiple colors blended together.

## Import

```jsx
import { ColorSwatch, ColorSwatchMix } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Exports

| Export | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `ColorSwatch` | Displays a single color sample. |
| `ColorSwatchMix` | Displays a blended mix of multiple colors. |

## Props

### ColorSwatch

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | - | A CSS color string (e.g., `"#ff0000"`, `"red"`, `"rgb(255,0,0)"`). |
| `size` | `"2xs" \| "xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" \| "xl" \| "2xl"` | `"md"` | The size of the swatch. |

### ColorSwatchMix

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `items` | `string[]` | - | An array of CSS color strings to blend. |

## Usage

### Basic Color Swatch

```jsx
<ColorSwatch value="#3182ce" />
```

### Color Swatch Sizes

```jsx
<ColorSwatch value="red" size="xs" />
<ColorSwatch value="green" size="sm" />
<ColorSwatch value="blue" size="md" />
<ColorSwatch value="purple" size="lg" />
```

### Color Mix

```jsx
<ColorSwatchMix items={["#ff0000", "#00ff00", "#0000ff"]} />
```

### Swatch in a Layout

```jsx
<HStack gap="2">
  <ColorSwatch value="#e53e3e" size="sm" />
  <Text>Red 500</Text>
</HStack>
```
